anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Path bollard 1 extracted from landscape architect Rev-A garden lighting layout dated 2026-05-26; 1000mm tall stainless cylindrical bollard, IP65 SELV LED luminaire, 12V SELV feed.
Path bollard 2 extracted from landscape architect Rev-A garden lighting layout dated 2026-05-26; 4m east of bollard 1 along the main east-west path; same SELV 12V feed.
Path bollard 3 extracted from landscape architect Rev-A garden lighting layout dated 2026-05-26; 4m east of bollard 2 along the main east-west path; same SELV 12V feed.
Bollard 4 added by lighting engineer at first review (north terrace edge) to balance the photometric pattern; not on architect Rev-A; engineer-manual-entry tier honest-disclosed for INV-09.
Bollard 5 added by lighting engineer at first review (north terrace edge) symmetric to bollard 4; engineer-manual-entry tier honest-disclosed for INV-09.

Bollard 6 inferred at the east feature-tree position based on landscape typology (illuminated feature tree); position assumed at the tree centroid from arboricultural survey; weakest provenance tier — engineer-of-record to verify final position.

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)
zones._derivation_note: ELV barrier zone for bollard 1: 500mm radius separation buffer per spec §5.4 ELV barrier-zone convention; 12-sided regular polygon approximation per spec §5.7. Inside the buffer ELV (12 V SELV) and LV (230 V) cables must be separated by ≥100mm OR by a physical barrier. The buffer is height-limited to 1500mm because bollard height is 1000mm and the cable-rise zone tops out at the bollard head.

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)
zones._derivation_note: ELV barrier zone for bollard 2: 500mm radius separation buffer; 12-sided polygon approximation. Bollard 2 at (7000,3000) — 4000mm clear of bollard 1; no overlap (sum of radii = 1000mm < 4000mm separation).

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)
zones._derivation_note: ELV barrier zone for bollard 3: 500mm radius separation buffer; 12-sided polygon. Bollard 3 at (11000,3000) — 4000mm clear of bollard 2; no overlap.

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)
zones._derivation_note: ELV barrier zone for bollard 4: 500mm radius separation buffer; 12-sided polygon. North terrace edge position; provenance is engineer_manual_entry (not architectural drawing) — surfaced in INV-09 and contributes to D-1 / D-5 reviewer judgment.

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)
zones._derivation_note: ELV barrier zone for bollard 5: 500mm radius separation buffer; 12-sided polygon. Symmetric mirror of bollard 4 across x=7500; same engineer_manual_entry provenance tier.

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)
zones._derivation_note: ELV barrier zone for bollard 6: 500mm radius separation buffer; 12-sided polygon. East feature-tree position; provenance is inferred_from_room_type — weakest tier — engineer-of-record to verify final position. Surfaced in INV-09 and primary trigger for D-1 reviewer flag (suppressed in this example because D-5 already covers the missing ambient temperature).

electrical_constraints._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)
electrical_constraints._derivation_note: ELV separation requirement per §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6: 12 V SELV bollard circuits must be separated from any 230 V LV cabling by ≥100 mm OR by an insulated barrier OR by routing in a separate conduit. The safety isolating transformer must be short-circuit protected per BS EN 61558-2-6 §17 (transformer-secondary side fault tolerance). Cable labelling required on every ELV circuit so future maintainers do not confuse 12 V with 230 V. All conditions enforced room-wide; no §715 sub-clauses exist in the verified file so honest disclosure stamped in _elv_general_citation.
electrical_constraints._elv_general_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)

assumptions: ELV barrier zone modelled as a 500mm radius cylinder around each bollard per spec §5.4 ELV barrier-zone convention; 12-sided regular polygon per spec §5.7.
Ambient temperature not supplied — default 30°C cable de-rating assumed per BS 7671:2018 Appendix 4 Table 4B1; engineer-of-record to verify per the D-5 reviewer flag (see _engineering_judgments[]).
Bollard heights uniform at 1000mm; barrier zone height_max set to 1500mm to cover the cable rise into the bollard head plus a 500mm tolerance.
All 6 bollards fed from a single SELV isolating transformer assumed to be sourced inside the building plant room (transformer is NOT itself in any zone_2-style zone).
_engineering_judgments: REVIEWER D-5: external installation (room.is_external=true) without ambient_temperature_c supplied. Default 30°C cable de-rating per BS 7671:2018 Appendix 4 Table 4B1 assumed; engineer-of-record to verify against installation-site temperature data before sign-off.

REVIEWER D-1 (informational, not blocking): elv_bollard_6 sourced via inferred_from_room_type (weakest provenance tier per INV-09). Engineer-of-record to verify final feature-tree centroid position before installation. D-5 is the primary reviewer flag for this example; D-1 noted here for transparency.

invariants.evidence: 6 anchors (elv_bollard_1..6) produce 6 zones[] (one elv_barrier_zone each). Pairwise centre-to-centre distances 4000mm (1↔2, 2↔3) and >5000mm (4↔5, others) — all exceed sum-of-radii (1000mm) → no overlaps; overlapping_with_zone_ids empty on every zone. No silent merges.

existing_fixtures_audit[] has 6 entries (one elv_luminaire per bollard position), all compliance_status=compliant. non_compliance_flags[] empty. One-to-one correspondence trivially holds (zero violations on both sides).
No medical_envelope_group_2 zone present in IR. §710 + BS EN 61557-8 medical IT system requirement N/A; INV-03 vacuously passes per spec §7.2.
room_type=external_landscape, not bathroom/shower_room/sauna. §701.411.3.3 + §703.411.3.3 RCD blanket N/A — INV-04 vacuously passes per spec §7.2.
Not a swimming_pool_hall. §702.415.1 pool main equipotential bonding N/A — INV-05 vacuously passes.
No bath_basin (no bath_tray fixture_type). §701.512.2 whirlpool pump IPx5 constraint N/A — INV-06 vacuously passes.

6 elv_luminaire anchor_fixtures present (room_type=external_landscape). Required §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 elv_separation constraint present with lv_cable_spacing_mm_min=100, barrier_required=true, label_required=true, transformer_short_circuit_protected=true and applies_to_zone_ids covering all 6 barrier zones. _elv_general_citation honest-disclosure stamped (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file).

6 fixtures audited: ext_elv_1..ext_elv_6 each (IPx5, 12V SELV, no RCD required — SELV bypasses §415.1 RCD obligation per §414.4) at their bollard positions. All 6 sit inside their corresponding zone polygons (centre-coincident with the polygon centroid). All 4 sub-rules (type, IP, switch-distance, voltage) PASS for all 6 fixtures.

Mixed provenance: bollards 1/2/3 use architectural_drawing_extraction (strongest); 4/5 use engineer_manual_entry; 6 uses inferred_from_room_type (weakest). All 6 _provenance_note strings ≥40 chars (lengths range 156-189). Provenance disclosure complete; mixed-tier honestly surfaced via D-1 informational flag in _engineering_judgments[].

compliant=true ∧ violation_count_critical=0 ∧ non_compliance_flags=[] ∧ no zone overlaps catalogued (all 6 zones isolated). D-flags surfaced in _engineering_judgments[] as informational only (D-5 + informational D-1) — neither downgrades compliant=true. Self-consistency holds.

rationale.chat_summary: Standalone external landscape garden — 20×15m area with 6 ELV bollard luminaires (12V SELV). 6 elv_barrier_zone entries (500mm radius, 12-sided polygon). elv_separation constraint per §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (≥100mm LV/ELV cable separation + barrier + label + short-circuit-protected transformer). room.is_external=true; no ambient_temperature_c → D-5 reviewer flag (default 30°C de-rating assumed). Mixed provenance honestly surfaced (3 extracted + 2 engineer-manual + 1 inferred). All 6 fixtures compliant. All 10 INVs PASS.

sections.title: Standards applied
sections.summary: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §715 governs SELV / PELV / FELV extra-low-voltage installations; only the §715 top-level citation is valid in the verified file (no §715 sub-clauses are verified-file-valid per spec §3.2 banned-list). BS EN 61558-2-6 (safety isolating transformers for general use) governs the secondary-side short-circuit protection that §715 cross-references; the transformer must withstand a sustained short-circuit on the SELV side without failing-open dangerously. BS 5489-1 (code of practice for design of road lighting — exterior) is the typical external-installation companion document for the photometric design but does not change the §715 electrical-safety obligations. BS 7671 Appendix 4 Table 4B1 governs ambient-temperature de-rating of cables outside the safety scope of §715 — surfaced via D-5 because ambient temperature is missing.

sections.title: Zone derivation logic
sections.summary: Each elv_barrier_zone is a 500 mm radius cylinder around the bollard, 12-sided regular polygon approximation per spec §5.7. Height_min=0, height_max=1500 mm covers the cable rise from below-ground feed through the 1000 mm bollard plus a 500 mm tolerance for the head. Vertices computed at 30° intervals from each bollard centroid with r=500. All 6 zones are isolated (no overlap) because pairwise separations exceed 1000 mm (sum of radii); the closest pair is bollards 1↔2 at 4000 mm centre-to-centre.

sections.title: Honest disclosures
sections.summary: Four explicit assumptions: (1) ELV barrier zone modelled as 500 mm radius cylinder per spec §5.4; (2) ambient temperature missing — 30°C default assumed per Appendix 4 Table 4B1 (D-5 reviewer flag fires); (3) bollard heights uniform at 1000 mm; (4) single SELV isolating transformer fed from indoor plant room. Two engineering judgments recorded: D-5 (missing ambient, blocking-grade by review) and informational D-1 (bollard 6 inferred-tier provenance). The §715 sub-clause absence is honest-disclosed in every zone's _clause_citation AND in the constraint's _elv_general_citation field — no banned sub-clauses appear anywhere.

sections.title: Failure modes considered
sections.summary: If ambient_temperature_c were supplied with a value outside 5-40°C, the cable de-rating math would change but the §715 zoning would not. If a 230 V LV cable were routed within 100 mm of any bollard barrier zone WITHOUT an insulated barrier, the elv_separation constraint would FAIL and INV-07 would FAIL — caught downstream when small-power runs the cable-route cross-check against this intent. If the SELV isolating transformer lacked short-circuit protection (BS EN 61558-2-6 §17), the constraint flag transformer_short_circuit_protected=true would FAIL and the IR would emit a high-severity non_compliance_flag. None of these failure modes occur in this example because the input fixtures all sit cleanly inside their barrier zones, no LV cable proximity is declared, and the transformer is assumed compliant.
